title: [Lirafyr Cottage, Breakfast Nook]
description: Double raised paneling lines the walls of this small room with hand-carvings along the upper trim line, the pattern cascading downwards to eventually fade about mid-way down.  Encroaching the majority of the southern wall is a large bay window, while pressed up against it is a square dinette table with some matching chairs.  Stark in contrast to the otherwise dark wood-paneled room is a pale green door to the east, while a small crystal bar sits in the northeast corner.
